symbols.name: Create()
symbols.summary: Creates the default System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions preconfigured for the DevKit.
symbols.remarks: Defaults applied: System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions.WriteIndented = trueSystem.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions.PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = trueSystem.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions.PropertyNamingPolicy = System.Text.Json.JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCaseSystem.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions.DefaultIgnoreCondition = System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNullSystem.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions.TypeInfoResolver = BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.UniversalContractResolver (supports private constructors)Enum converters using BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.EnumMemberConverter%601 for several internal enumsResult converters (BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.ResultJsonConverter, value & paged result factories)System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonStringEnumConverter for string enum serialization Use one of the overloads with parameters to append converters or override settings after creation.

returns.description: A new instance of System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions with the DevKit defaults applied.
A new instance of System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions with the DevKit defaults applied.

symbols.name: Create(params JsonConverter[])
symbols.summary: Creates the default System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions and appends additional converters.
symbols.remarks: This overload is additive only. To override existing properties (e.g. naming policy) use the BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.DefaultJsonSerializerOptions.Create(System.Action%7bSystem.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions%7d) overload.

syntax.content: public static JsonSerializerOptions Create(params JsonConverter[] converters)

parameters.description: Additional converters to add. Null instances are skipped.
Additional converters to add. Null instances are skipped.
